attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
NAFPRHN.PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_NAME as BK_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_NAME   , NAFPRHN.PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_DESCR  as PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_DESCR     
,NAFPRHN.FORECAST_PLNG_LEVEL_NUM_INT  as FORECAST_PLNG_LEVEL_NUM_INT ,
NODE_LEVEL01_NAME             ,NODE_LEVEL01_DESCR            ,NODE_LEVEL01_PLNG_LEVL_NUM_INT,
NODE_LEVEL02_NAME             ,NODE_LEVEL02_DESCR            ,NODE_LEVEL02_PLNG_LEVL_NUM_INT,
NODE_LEVEL03_NAME             ,NODE_LEVEL03_DESCR            ,NODE_LEVEL03_PLNG_LEVL_NUM_INT,
NODE_LEVEL04_NAME             ,NODE_LEVEL04_DESCR            ,NODE_LEVEL04_PLNG_LEVL_NUM_INT,
NODE_LEVEL05_NAME             ,NODE_LEVEL05_DESCR            ,NODE_LEVEL05_PLNG_LEVL_NUM_INT,
NODE_LEVEL06_NAME             ,NODE_LEVEL06_DESCR            ,NODE_LEVEL06_PLNG_LEVL_NUM_INT,
NODE_LEVEL07_NAME             ,NODE_LEVEL07_DESCR            ,NODE_LEVEL07_PLNG_LEVL_NUM_INT,
NODE_LEVEL08_NAME             ,NODE_LEVEL08_DESCR            ,NODE_LEVEL08_PLNG_LEVL_NUM_INT,

NODE_LEVEL13_NAME             ,NODE_LEVEL13_DESCR            ,NODE_LEVEL13_PLNG_LEVL_NUM_INT,
NODE_LEVEL14_NAME             ,NODE_LEVEL14_DESCR            ,NODE_LEVEL14_PLNG_LEVL_NUM_INT,
NODE_LEVEL15_NAME             ,NODE_LEVEL15_DESCR            ,NODE_LEVEL15_PLNG_LEVL_NUM_INT
from 
(
select   
Coalesce(
LEVEL15.BK_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_NAME,LEVEL14.BK_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_NAME,
LEVEL13.BK_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_NAME,LEVEL12.BK_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_NAME,
LEVEL11.BK_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_NAME,LEVEL10.BK_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_NAME,
LEVEL09.BK_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_NAME,LEVEL08.BK_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_NAME,
LEVEL07.BK_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_NAME,LEVEL06.BK_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_NAME,
LEVEL05.BK_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_NAME,LEVEL04.BK_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_NAME,
LEVEL03.BK_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_NAME,LEVEL02.BK_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_NAME,
LEVEL01.BK_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_NAME
) As PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_NAME,


Coalesce(
LEVEL15.PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_DESCR,LEVEL14.PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_DESCR,
LEVEL13.PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_DESCR,LEVEL12.PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_DESCR,
LEVEL11.PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_DESCR,LEVEL10.PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_DESCR,
LEVEL09.PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_DESCR,LEVEL08.PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_DESCR,
LEVEL07.PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_DESCR,LEVEL06.PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_DESCR,
LEVEL05.PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_DESCR,LEVEL04.PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_DESCR,
LEVEL03.PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_DESCR,LEVEL02.PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_DESCR,
LEVEL01.PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_DESCR
) As PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_DESCR,

Coalesce(
LEVEL15.FORECAST_PLNG_LEVEL_NUM_INT,LEVEL14.FORECAST_PLNG_LEVEL_NUM_INT,
LEVEL13.FORECAST_PLNG_LEVEL_NUM_INT,LEVEL12.FORECAST_PLNG_LEVEL_NUM_INT,
LEVEL11.FORECAST_PLNG_LEVEL_NUM_INT,LEVEL10.FORECAST_PLNG_LEVEL_NUM_INT,
LEVEL09.FORECAST_PLNG_LEVEL_NUM_INT,LEVEL08.FORECAST_PLNG_LEVEL_NUM_INT,
LEVEL07.FORECAST_PLNG_LEVEL_NUM_INT,LEVEL06.FORECAST_PLNG_LEVEL_NUM_INT,
LEVEL05.FORECAST_PLNG_LEVEL_NUM_INT,LEVEL04.FORECAST_PLNG_LEVEL_NUM_INT,
LEVEL03.FORECAST_PLNG_LEVEL_NUM_INT,LEVEL02.FORECAST_PLNG_LEVEL_NUM_INT,

) As FORECAST_PLNG_LEVEL_NUM_INT,

LEVEL01.BK_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_NAME as  NODE_LEVEL01_NAME                ,
LEVEL01.PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_DESCR as NODE_LEVEL01_DESCR                        ,
LEVEL01.DV_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_LVL_INT as NODE_LEVEL01_PLNG_LEVL_NUM_INT             ,

LEVEL02.BK_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_NAME as  NODE_LEVEL02_NAME                ,
LEVEL02.PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_DESCR as NODE_LEVEL02_DESCR                        ,
LEVEL02.DV_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_LVL_INT as NODE_LEVEL02_PLNG_LEVL_NUM_INT,

LEVEL03.BK_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_NAME as  NODE_LEVEL03_NAME                ,
LEVEL03.PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_DESCR as NODE_LEVEL03_DESCR                        ,
LEVEL03.DV_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_LVL_INT as NODE_LEVEL03_PLNG_LEVL_NUM_INT,

LEVEL04.BK_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_NAME as  NODE_LEVEL04_NAME                ,
LEVEL04.PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_DESCR as NODE_LEVEL04_DESCR                        ,
LEVEL04.DV_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_LVL_INT as NODE_LEVEL04_PLNG_LEVL_NUM_INT,

LEVEL05.BK_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_NAME as  NODE_LEVEL05_NAME                ,
LEVEL05.PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_DESCR as NODE_LEVEL05_DESCR                        ,
LEVEL05.DV_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_LVL_INT as NODE_LEVEL05_PLNG_LEVL_NUM_INT,

LEVEL06.BK_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_NAME as  NODE_LEVEL06_NAME                ,
LEVEL06.PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_DESCR as NODE_LEVEL06_DESCR                        ,
LEVEL06.DV_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_LVL_INT as NODE_LEVEL06_PLNG_LEVL_NUM_INT,

LEVEL07.BK_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_NAME as  NODE_LEVEL07_NAME                ,
LEVEL07.PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_DESCR as NODE_LEVEL07_DESCR                        ,
LEVEL07.DV_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_LVL_INT as NODE_LEVEL07_PLNG_LEVL_NUM_INT,

LEVEL09.BK_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_NAME as  NODE_LEVEL09_NAME                ,
LEVEL09.PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_DESCR as NODE_LEVEL09_DESCR                        ,
LEVEL09.DV_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_LVL_INT as NODE_LEVEL09_PLNG_LEVL_NUM_INT,

LEVEL10.BK_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_NAME as  NODE_LEVEL10_NAME                ,
LEVEL10.PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_DESCR as NODE_LEVEL10_DESCR                        ,
LEVEL10.DV_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_LVL_INT as NODE_LEVEL10_PLNG_LEVL_NUM_INT,

LEVEL11.BK_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_NAME as  NODE_LEVEL11_NAME                ,
LEVEL11.PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_DESCR as NODE_LEVEL11_DESCR                        ,
LEVEL11.DV_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_LVL_INT as NODE_LEVEL11_PLNG_LEVL_NUM_INT,

LEVEL12.BK_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_NAME as  NODE_LEVEL12_NAME                ,
LEVEL12.PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_DESCR as NODE_LEVEL12_DESCR                        ,
LEVEL12.DV_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_LVL_INT as NODE_LEVEL12_PLNG_LEVL_NUM_INT,

LEVEL13.BK_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_NAME as  NODE_LEVEL13_NAME                ,
LEVEL13.PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_DESCR as NODE_LEVEL13_DESCR                        ,
LEVEL13.DV_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_LVL_INT as NODE_LEVEL13_PLNG_LEVL_NUM_INT,

LEVEL14.BK_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_NAME as  NODE_LEVEL14_NAME                ,
LEVEL14.PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_DESCR as NODE_LEVEL14_DESCR                        ,
LEVEL14.DV_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_LVL_INT as NODE_LEVEL14_PLNG_LEVL_NUM_INT,

LEVEL15.BK_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_NAME as  NODE_LEVEL15_NAME                ,
LEVEL15.PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_DESCR as NODE_LEVEL15_DESCR                        ,
LEVEL15.DV_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_LVL_INT as NODE_LEVEL15_PLNG_LEVL_NUM_INT


FROM
( SELECT * FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_APSP_FIN_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE MAFPH 
WHERE  DV_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_LVL_INT = 1 ) LEVEL01 

LEFT OUTER JOIN
( SELECT * FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_APSP_FIN_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE MAFPH 
WHERE  DV_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_LVL_INT = 2  )  LEVEL02 
on  LEVEL01.BK_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_NAME = LEVEL02.RU_PRNT_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_NM

LEFT OUTER JOIN
( SELECT * FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_APSP_FIN_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE MAFPH 
WHERE  DV_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_LVL_INT = 3  )  LEVEL03 
on  LEVEL02.BK_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_NAME = LEVEL03.RU_PRNT_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_NM

LEFT OUTER JOIN
( SELECT * FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_APSP_FIN_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE MAFPH 
WHERE  DV_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_LVL_INT = 4  )  LEVEL04 
on  LEVEL03.BK_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_NAME = LEVEL04.RU_PRNT_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_NM

LEFT OUTER JOIN
( SELECT * FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_APSP_FIN_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE MAFPH 
WHERE  DV_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_LVL_INT = 5  )  LEVEL05 
on  LEVEL04.BK_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_NAME = LEVEL05.RU_PRNT_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_NM

LEFT OUTER JOIN
( SELECT * FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_APSP_FIN_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE MAFPH 
WHERE  DV_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_LVL_INT = 6  )  LEVEL06 
on  LEVEL05.BK_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_NAME = LEVEL06.RU_PRNT_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_NM

LEFT OUTER JOIN
( SELECT * FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_APSP_FIN_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE MAFPH 
WHERE  DV_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_LVL_INT = 7  )  LEVEL07 
on  LEVEL06.BK_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_NAME = LEVEL07.RU_PRNT_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_NM

LEFT OUTER JOIN
( SELECT * FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_APSP_FIN_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE MAFPH 
WHERE  DV_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_LVL_INT = 8  )  LEVEL08 
on  LEVEL07.BK_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_NAME = LEVEL08.RU_PRNT_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_NM

LEFT OUTER JOIN
( SELECT * FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_APSP_FIN_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE MAFPH 
WHERE  DV_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_LVL_INT = 9  )  LEVEL09 
on  LEVEL08.BK_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_NAME = LEVEL09.RU_PRNT_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_NM

LEFT OUTER JOIN
( SELECT * FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_APSP_FIN_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE MAFPH 
WHERE  DV_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_LVL_INT = 10  )  LEVEL10 
on  LEVEL09.BK_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_NAME = LEVEL10.RU_PRNT_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_NM

LEFT OUTER JOIN
( SELECT * FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_APSP_FIN_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE MAFPH 
WHERE  DV_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_LVL_INT = 11  )  LEVEL11 
on  LEVEL10.BK_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_NAME = LEVEL11.RU_PRNT_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_NM

LEFT OUTER JOIN
( SELECT * FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_APSP_FIN_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE MAFPH 
WHERE  DV_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_LVL_INT = 12  )  LEVEL12 
on  LEVEL11.BK_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_NAME = LEVEL12.RU_PRNT_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_NM

LEFT OUTER JOIN
( SELECT * FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_APSP_FIN_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE MAFPH 
WHERE  DV_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_LVL_INT = 13  )  LEVEL13 
on  LEVEL12.BK_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_NAME = LEVEL13.RU_PRNT_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_NM

LEFT OUTER JOIN
( SELECT * FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_APSP_FIN_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE MAFPH 
WHERE  DV_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_LVL_INT = 14  )  LEVEL14 
on  LEVEL13.BK_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_NAME = LEVEL14.RU_PRNT_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_NM

LEFT OUTER JOIN
( SELECT * FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_APSP_FIN_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE MAFPH 
WHERE  DV_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_LVL_INT = 15  )  LEVEL15 
on  LEVEL14.BK_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_NAME = LEVEL15.RU_PRNT_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_NM
)NAFPRHN
where not exists 
    (select 1 from $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_APSP_FIN_PL_RPTNG_HIERARCHY  MAFPRH 
               WHERE MAFPRH.BK_PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_NAME = NAFPRHN.PNL_RPTNG_HIER_NODE_NAME )
